title: myosotis discolor subsp. persoonii
intro: Myosotis discolor subsp. persoonii, also known as the yellow wood forget-me-not, is a subspecies of the forget-me-not plant, characterized by its yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. The herbal preparations of Myosotis discolor subsp. persoonii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
